description_long: This is a large, upscale suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled roof and a light-colored exterior. The front features a double garage, a driveway with two parked cars, and a manicured lawn with several trees and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio area, and additional landscaping. Multiple large windows and French doors provide ample natural light and views to the outside. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall and has a mix of paved and grassy areas. Architectural details include dormer windows, a prominent entryway, and a blend of hip and gable roof elements.
description: A large, elegant suburban house with a multi-gabled roof, double garage, landscaped yard, and backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway with two cars, main entryway, and manicured front lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the side yard with a glimpse of the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, large windows, and lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entry, additional landscaping, and the transition between front and back yards.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and French doors
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent main entry with steps, double doors, and a small overhang, flanked by decorative columns and landscaping
